Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image

img = Image.open\("/Users/brock/torch-football/public/images/broadcast-host.jpg"\)
w, h = img.size
print\(f"Size: {w}x{h}"\)

# Check bottom-right area for the watermark star
# Crop bottom 10% off to remove watermark
crop_h = int\(h * 0.90\)
img_cropped = img.crop\(\(0, 0, w, crop_h\)\)

# Create new image with black background at original aspect
out = Image.new\("RGB", \(w, crop_h\), \(5, 0, 21\)\)  # #050015 background color
out.paste\(img_cropped, \(0, 0\)\)

out.save\("/Users/brock/torch-football/public/images/broadcast-host.jpg", quality=90\)
print\(f"Saved: {w}x{crop_h}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3.12 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image

img = Image.open\("/Users/brock/torch-football/public/images/broadcast-host.jpg"\)
w, h = img.size
print\(f"Size: {w}x{h}"\)

# Crop bottom 10% to remove watermark
crop_h = int\(h * 0.90\)
img_cropped = img.crop\(\(0, 0, w, crop_h\)\)

# Create new image with app background color \(#050015\)
out = Image.new\("RGB", \(w, crop_h\), \(5, 0, 21\)\)
out.paste\(img_cropped, \(0, 0\)\)

out.save\("/Users/brock/torch-football/public/images/broadcast-host.jpg", quality=90\)
print\(f"Saved: {w}x{crop_h}"\)
PYEOF)
Bash(which python3.12 && python3.12 -c "import sys; print\(sys.executable\); import PIL; print\('pil ok'\)" 2>&1)
